title: Pilaf and Pear Canadian Delight
description: A delicious and easy-to-make pilaf dish with a sweet twist, featuring Canadian bacon and a crunchy pear garnish.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced Canadian bacon and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the cooked pilaf to the pan and stir to combine with the Canadian bacon.
Add the diced pear to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the pilaf mixture to a serving dish.
Sprinkle the crushed nuts or seeds on top for garnish.
